problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Combining Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
